ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Cluster ID to which the country belongs based on socio-economic and health indicators */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region of the country */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of indicators */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the indicators */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the indicators are measured */,
  "child_mort" REAL /* Child mortality rate (per 1,000 live births) */,
  "exports" REAL /* Value of exports (as a percentage of GDP) */,
  "health" REAL /* Health expenditure (as a percentage of GDP) */,
  "imports" REAL /* Value of imports (as a percentage of GDP) */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Income level (in USD) */,
  "inflation" REAL /* Inflation rate (as a percentage) */,
  "life_expec" REAL /* Life expectancy (in years) */,
  "total_fer" REAL /* Total fertility rate (number of children per woman) */,
  "gdpp" REAL /* GDP per capita (in USD) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country for the given year */,
  "gdp_nominal" REAL /* Nominal GDP of the country for the given year */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate of the country for the given year */,
  "human_development_index" REAL /* Human Development Index (HDI) of the country for the given year */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_health_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each country
Name of the country
Cluster ID to which the country belongs based on socio-economic and health indicators
Region of the country
Sub-region of the country
Income group of the country
